name: Oracle APEX Universal Theme Vita - Dark Reference Layer

referencePages.label: Reference Overview

enterprisePrototypeRules: Use APEX utility classes and CSS variables before adding custom CSS.
Use Button Builder semantics for report links, static content buttons, toolbar buttons, and icon buttons.
Use color and status modifiers for semantic status states.
Use layout/content modifiers for spacing, alignment, responsive visibility, wrapping, and dense enterprise copy.
Keep Template Directives visible only when demonstrating APEX template logic.
Target Universal Theme 26.1 behavior unless a prompt explicitly asks for legacy migration.
